title: nbx dev --help
stdout_full:
Usage: root dev [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                    
                                                                                
 Developer-focused tools and experimental interfaces.

│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │

╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
